name: Contract Formation — Representations and Warranties
text: This Agreement constitutes a valid and binding contract formed by free consent of the parties for a lawful consideration and lawful object.
invalid_if: Consent is obtained by coercion, fraud, or misrepresentation
Object of the agreement is unlawful
title: Formation of Contract
dispute_hotspots: Signatory without board resolution — company can disown contract under Companies Act
Insolvency at time of signing — IBC moratorium makes new contracts voidable
